scenarioDescription: Emily Smith, a new patient, calls to schedule an initial consultation. She provides all necessary personal information, including her insurance details. She also asks a few questions about the clinic services before the agent transitions to scheduling her first appointment.
name: Emily Smith
criteria: The agent collects Emily's information accurately and answers questions about the clinic before proceeding with the scheduling of her appointment.

scenarioDescription: Michael Johnson, an existing patient, calls to discuss his recent lab results and medical history. He is directed to speak with a specialist regarding his concerns after providing personal verification details. Michael needs assurance that the right information is relayed.
name: Michael Johnson
criteria: The agent confirms Michael's identity and efficiently transitions the call to HPI_COLLECTION where his medical history is discussed.

scenarioName: Confused Caller - Transition to Human Agent
scenarioDescription: Sophie Turner calls the clinic to ask about a bill she received, but she is not clear on the charges. She provides her contact details and expresses difficulty in understanding her insurance coverage. The AI agent assesses that a human agent can better address her billing issues and offers to connect Sophie promptly.
name: Sophie Turner
criteria: The agent determines Sophie's inquiry about billing is best handled by a human and smoothly connects her to a human agent after verifying important details.
